ddls:
CREATE TABLE "training_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each training session */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the machine learning model being trained */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Time when the training session started */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* Time when the training session ended */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the training session (e.g., ongoing, completed, failed) */,
  "hyperparameters" TEXT /* Hyperparameters used in the training session */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the session */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the session */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the session */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Last update time of the session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_sessions_last_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_sessions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_sessions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each machine learning model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the model (e.g., CNN, RNN) */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the model */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the model */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation time of the model */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the model */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Last update time of the model */,
  "github_link" TEXT /* URL to the GitHub repository or source code */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dataset the model was trained on */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_models_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_models_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_models_last_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "training_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric entry */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the training session */,
  "epoch" INTEGER /* Epoch number of the training */,
  "batch_time" REAL /* Time taken to process the batch */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Time when the metric was recorded */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who recorded the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_metrics_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_metrics_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES training_sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data scientist, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login time of the user */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the dataset */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the dataset */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation time of the dataset */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the dataset */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Last update time of the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_last_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
